_meta.title: WEO Atlas Guided Journeys — single source of truth
_meta.purpose: Defines the operator-selected guided journeys ONCE. Consumed by atlas.html (clickable landing questions) and by the Worker MCP server (prompts + getting-started resource). Edit here only; the two surfaces read this file so they cannot drift.
_meta.spec: WS-8 Atlas Guided Journeys (WEO_WS8_ATLAS_GUIDED_JOURNEYS_BUILD_SPEC_V1.md); journeys from WEO_WS8_SELECTED_JOURNEYS_V1.md.
_meta.discipline: V1.4 methodology — question wording is RELATIONAL, readouts are DESCRIPTIVE (counts + named entities only, never causal/interpretive).
_meta.served_at: https://warmthengine.com/guided-journeys.json (Pages). Worker fetches the apex host directly; www 301-redirects to apex.
_meta.counts: Readout {placeholders} are filled by the LIVE journey at click time — never hard-code. B1 material = thread RECORDS (get_threads, ~19); C1 material = event-PAIRS (get_event_stack, ~15). The two counting methods differ deliberately.
_meta.chain_dependency: Journeys are pinned to stable anchor chains (E93 spine; E196 NVIDIA hub). A future loop that re-shapes these chains must refresh this file. Anchors chosen for durability per the curation pass.

journeys.title: China generative-AI regulatory cascade
journeys.question: What generative-AI services and rules cascade from China's Algorithm Recommendation Provisions?
journeys.readout: China's foundational AI provisions — a regulatory-enablement chain (CC-V) feeding {n} downstream items, including Baidu ERNIE Bot, Doubao, the AI Content Labelling Measures, and TC260 security requirements.

journeys.title: NVIDIA accelerator deployment hub
journeys.question: Which supercomputers, data centres, and AI models run on NVIDIA's accelerators, and on which chip generation?
journeys.readout: NVIDIA AI Accelerator Series — {n} material (deploys) links across 9 chip generations, from 15 Western facilities (Stargate, JUPITER, Isambard-AI, Fairwater, Tesla Cortex, Meta, EuroHPC Leonardo…).

journeys.title: NVIDIA accelerators across all layers
journeys.question: Which AI systems run on NVIDIA's accelerators, and which national capabilities draw on them?
journeys.readout: NVIDIA AI Accelerator Series — {mat} material links (9 chip generations, 15 Western facilities), {cap} capability contributions across the stack (D1/D4/D5/D6/D7; US/JP/EU/GB).
